summary: Completed comprehensive testing of JPM-SwingEdge Pro iteration 2. All 42 backend API tests pass (including 9 new ML endpoints). All 7 frontend pages load and function correctly. Code review fixes verified: XSS fix (useRef instead of innerHTML), useCallback in all components, stable React keys, secrets module, no console.log.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ XSS fix verified - StockDeepDive.jsx uses useRef instead of innerHTML for chart disposal
✓ useCallback used in all major components (CommandCenter, IntradayMonitor, StockDeepDive, etc.)
✓ Stable React keys using composite keys (ticker-strategy, title-source)
✓ secrets module used instead of random in fyers_client.py
✓ No console.log statements in frontend code
✓ Extracted sub-components: MarketOverview, SignalRow, SignalCard, MarketStatus, IndicatorCard, PriceLevel
test_credentials: No auth needed - demo mode with mock data
seed_data_creation: None - uses mock data from Fyers client
context_for_next_testing_agent: All APIs and pages working. 9 new ML endpoints tested and passing. Code review fixes verified. Fyers API and SERP API are MOCKED (using placeholder keys). ML models trained on synthetic data at startup (HMM convergence warning is expected and harmless).

mocked_apis.Fyers Market Data API: Returns realistic mock OHLCV data when API keys are placeholders
mocked_apis.SERP News API: Returns mock financial news headlines when API key is placeholder
mocked_apis.ML Models: Trained on synthetic data at startup

backend_apis: GET /api/market/regime - Returns market regime, nifty price, VIX, FII flow ✓
frontend_pages: Command Center - Signals table, market regime header, run scan ✓
Strategy Lab - All 13 strategy cards with toggle and backtest button ✓
Risk Manager - Fixed Fractional and Kelly Criterion calculations ✓
Stock Deep Dive - TradingView chart with indicators (XSS-safe) ✓
Sentiment Hub - News headlines with sentiment scores ✓
Backtest Suite - Strategy selection and run backtest ✓
Intraday Monitor - Live intraday signals with countdown timer ✓
Sidebar navigation - Works across all 7 pages ✓
code_review_fixes_verified: XSS fix - useRef instead of innerHTML in StockDeepDive.jsx ✓

instruction_manual: /app/STRATEGY_GUIDE.md exists with developer guide for adding new strategies
